content.problemStatement:
Implementation of Queue  (2.5 Marks)We are implementing queue using an array, We first initialize an array with a fixed size which will be the max size of our queue. we will be also using three global variable here :-


front - for tracing the index of first element of queue.
rear - for tracing the index of rear element of queue.
maxSize - storing the max size of array.
current size - give the current number element in a queue
isEmpty function
Checks if the queue is empty.
isFull() Function:
Checks if the queue is full.
size() Function:
Checks the current size of queue .
Task
Given three function for the implementation of queue
Complete the isempty,isfull and size  function.

sampleTestCases.output:
Queue is Empty
Queue is Not Full
Current Size: 0

hidden.expectedOutput:
Queue is Empty
Queue is Not Full
Current Size: 0
